title: Mimikatz: Command and Module Indicators in Process Logs
description: Detects Mimikatz command and module strings in Windows Security Event 4688 process creation and 4624/4648 logon events. Covers sekurlsa, lsadump, kerberos, dpapi, crypto modules and common Mimikatz post-exploitation patterns. Works with real Windows Security Events via Original Log Content matching.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '4688') and ( (('Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::logonpasswords*' or 'Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::wdigest*' or 'Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::kerberos*' or 'Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::msv*' or 'Command Line' like '*sekurlsa::tspkg*' or 'Command Line' like '*lsadump::sam*' or 'Command Line' like '*lsadump::lsa /patch*' or 'Command Line' like '*lsadump::dcsync*' or 'Command Line' like '*kerberos::list*' or 'Command Line' like '*kerberos::golden*' or 'Command Line' like '*kerberos::ptt*' or 'Command Line' like '*dpapi::cred*' or 'Command Line' like '*crypto::certificates*' or 'Command Line' like '*token::elevate*' or 'Command Line' like '*privilege::debug*' or 'Command Line' like '*misc::memssp*')) or (('Command Line' like '*mimikatz*' or 'Command Line' like '*mimi32*' or 'Command Line' like '*mimi64*' or 'Command Line' like '*gentilkiwi*' or 'Command Line' like '*benjamin DELPY*')) or (('Command Line' like '*SID                :*' or 'Command Line' like '*User               :*' or 'Command Line' like '** Username :*' or 'Command Line' like '** Domain   :*' or 'Command Line' like '** NTLM     :*' or 'Command Line' like '** SHA1     :*' or 'Command Line' like '*Authentication Id :*' or 'Command Line' like '*wdigest :*' or 'Command Line' like '*tspkg :*' or 'Command Line' like '*kerberos :*')) ))
falsepositives: Security testing tools that emulate Mimikatz output
Honeypot systems designed to attract credential dumpers
